title: Gemini visual review S04 panel a1

payload.notes: Gemini auto-gemini-3 VISUAL review of S04_panel_a01.png, mode=baked。CANONICAL DUO 双人身份在像素风格下保持稳定：蓝衣 executor（棕发无须）于卡扇中心高跳撒卡，跳跃高度明显低于其 S02 hand-off MAX 跳；绿衣 reviewer（黑发有须）立于工作台边整理卡序、眉头微锁，均与 duo_canonical_ref 一致，identity_consistency=5。#0A0E27 暗空洞 'idea workshop'（密度对齐 cal_S12）配色统一：霓虹边缘 generator 工作台、拖光浮卡、悬浮书架 LLM DECODING / IDEA SPACE 书脊、霓虹网格地面向消失点收束，唯一一盏暖色台灯破冷，贴合 ART_BIBLE 暗世界基调，style_consistency=5。构图可读、视线导向清晰（executor 撒卡 → 中央 IDEA DECK 卡扇：20 IDEAS 徽章 → '#01 schema-first' 唯一可读卡 → 琥珀 DDL chip T-19:42 → reviewer 理卡），composition_readability=5。无肢体崩坏/融合/边缘粒子伪影，artifact_severity=0。本稿为 baked-duo：baked CJK 气泡与英文技术字面清晰可读、拼写正确（含右侧 audit 代码列逐行可辨），baked_text_quality=5；观察到的字面文本 observed_literals=["LLM DECODING", "IDEA SPACE", "20 IDEAS", "#01", "schema-first", "DDL", "T-19:42", "def audit(plan):", "invariants = []", "for step in plan:", "check(step)", "return report(invariants)"]，与 B03 void-side idea-fan 语境一致，content_corruption_present=false。安全区保留（safezone_present=true）；无游离的 HTML-冲突字形 stray_text_present=false。[transcribed from gemini auto-gemini-3 CLI read, RC=0]
